summary: Classified #45912 as the current canonical PR for the configured-root skill symlink family. No close/comment/label mutation is planned: #45912 is useful but not merge-ready because of an unresolved Codex bundled-skill allowlist finding, #59688 overlaps but has failing/cancelled checks, and #63312 is related but covers a distinct user-managed .agents/skills symlink policy question. Linked #44051 stays open as the source bug, #46690 is independent product follow-up, and closed #61585 remains historical evidence only.
